name: God, in whom the believers have faith, is forgiving and ready to pardon even the worst
introduction:
criminals and sinners after they have renounced their arrogant defiance towards Him. It is
suggested that this attribute of God should be reflected in the behaviour of the believers as
well. As the saying goes: 'Mould your morals according to the attributes of God.' Hence,
Whenever the believers have to resort to armed conflict, they should do so not for the sake
of quenching their thirst for vengeance but in the cause of God's religion. Their conflict with
any group should last only as long as that group resists the cause of God. As soon as it gives
up this resistance hostility should cease.
